## `hero`  *(animation · Core · v1.3)*

Shared-element transition wrapper. Wrap a child widget on the
source page AND on the destination page with the SAME `tag`; the
runtime morphs the source widget's bounds → destination widget's
bounds during the route transition (cover → detail magnification,
album cover → expanded album view). Pairs naturally with
`RouteTransition` styles such as `fade` or `sharedAxis`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `tag` | `string` | yes | — | Identifier shared between source and destination pages. Both sides MUST set the same tag for the morph to engage. Tags must be unique within each page (a single page cannot have two heroes with the same tag).  |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | The widget that morphs across the route boundary. |
| `transitionOnUserGestures` | `boolean` | no | false | When true, also morphs during gesture-driven back navigation (iOS swipe-from-edge). Adds slight render cost.  |
| `flightShuttleBuilder` | `Widget` | no | — | Optional intermediate widget used during the morph itself. When omitted the runtime tweens between the source and destination children.  |

### Examples

#### `cover_to_detail`

```json
{
  "type": "hero",
  "tag": "album-{{album.id}}",
  "child": {
    "type": "image",
    "src": "{{album.cover}}",
    "fit": "cover"
  }
}
```

---

## `icon`  *(display · Core)*

Displays an icon. The `icon` property accepts five source forms — pick
the lightest option that fits the asset:

1. **Named (built-in)** — `"home"`, `"folder_open"`, … from the runtime's
   Material Icons resolver table. Zero-cost.
2. **Codepoint** — `{codepoint, fontFamily?, fontPackage?}` for Material
   Icons codepoints not in the name table.
3. **URL** — `https://…` or `http://…` (raster or SVG). Fetched and cached
   at first render.
4. **Bundle SVG asset** — `assets/icons/<name>.svg` resolved from the bundle
   asset map. Used for app-specific icon sets shipped with the bundle.
5. **Local SVG inline** — `data:image/svg+xml;…` data URI for one-off icons
   embedded directly in the DSL.

The optional `shader` field paints the icon with a gradient/shader fill
(rather than a solid `color`). When both are set the shader wins.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `icon` | `string | object` | yes | — | Name, URL, bundle path, data URI, or codepoint object — see the five forms documented in the widget summary.  |
| `size` | `string` | no | — | Icon size. Accepts either a numeric dp value or an `AppIconSizes` token shorthand (`sm` / `md` / `lg` / `xl`) which scales with the active form factor.  |
| `sizeToken` | `string` | no | — | Responsive icon-size token. Equivalent to passing the same string via `size`; resolves through `AppIconSizes.of(context)` and tracks the form-factor scale (compact / medium / desktop / embedded).  |
| `color` | `Color` | no | — | Icon color. Applied to named / codepoint / SVG forms; for raster `URL` form it tints when supported. Ignored when `shader` is set.  |
| `shader` | `Gradient` | no | — | Gradient/shader fill (linear / radial / sweep). Painted via a shader mask over the icon's glyph alpha. Mutually exclusive with `color` — when both are present `shader` wins.  |

### Examples

#### `named`

```json
{ "type": "icon", "icon": "home", "size": 24, "color": "#2196F3" }
```

#### `codepoint`

```json
{ "type": "icon", "icon": { "codepoint": 59530 }, "size": 24 }
```

#### `url_raster`

```json
{ "type": "icon", "icon": "https://example.com/icon.png", "size": 32 }
```

#### `bundle_svg`

```json
{ "type": "icon", "icon": "assets/icons/heart.svg", "size": 32 }
```

#### `gradient_shader`

Icon painted with a linear gradient instead of a solid color.


```json
{
  "type": "icon",
  "icon": "favorite",
  "size": 48,
  "shader": {
    "type": "linear",
    "colors": ["#FF6B6B", "#FFD93D"],
    "begin": "topStart",
    "end": "bottomEnd"
  }
}
```

---

## `iconButton`  *(input · Core)*

Icon-only button for compact actions.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `icon` | `string` | yes | — | Icon name. |
| `size` | `number` | no | — | Icon size; uses theme default if omitted. |
| `color` | `string` | no | — | Icon color. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the button is interactive. |
| `onTap` | `Action` | no | — | Tap handler. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "iconButton",
  "icon": "favorite",
  "color": "#F44336",
  "onTap": { "type": "state", "action": "toggle", "binding": "isFavorite" }
}
```

---

## `image`  *(display · Core)*

Displays an image from a URL, bundle, or client resource.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `src` *(aliases: `source`, `backgroundImage`)* | `string` | yes | — | Image URL, `bundle://...`, or `client://...`. |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Width in logical pixels. |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Height in logical pixels. |
| `fit` | `string` | no | "contain" | `cover`, `contain`, `fill`, `none`, `scaleDown`, `fitHeight`, `fitWidth`. |
| `alignment` | `Alignment` | no | "center" | Alignment within bounds. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "image",
  "src": "https://example.com/image.png",
  "width": 200,
  "height": 150,
  "fit": "cover"
}
```

---

## `imageFilter`  *(display · Core · v1.3)*

Wraps a child with a colour / blur filter. Distinct from
`BoxDecoration.image.colorFilter` (which colours an image
background) — `imageFilter` filters the entire rendered subtree.
Use for sepia/grayscale book pages, blur-on-hover thumbnails,
saturation-bumped hero shots.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `filter` | `string` | yes | — | Filter kind: - `sepia` — warm-tone tint mimicking aged photograph. - `grayscale` — desaturate to luminance. - `blur` — Gaussian blur (sigma controlled by `intensity`). - `saturation` — multiply chroma by `intensity` (0 = grayscale, 1 = unchanged, >1 = pop). - `brightness` — multiply luminance. - `contrast` — increase / decrease contrast. - `invert` — colour invert (negative).  |
| `intensity` | `number` | no | 1.0 | Filter strength. Range and default depend on `filter`: - `sepia` / `grayscale` / `invert` — `0.0` (off) .. `1.0` (full). Default `1.0`. - `blur` — sigma in pixels (`0.0` off, typical 4..16). - `saturation` / `brightness` / `contrast` — multiplier (`1.0` unchanged).  |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Filtered subtree. |

### Examples

#### `sepia_book_page`

```json
{
  "type": "imageFilter",
  "filter": "sepia",
  "intensity": 0.7,
  "child": {
    "type": "image",
    "src": "{{chapter.illustration}}",
    "fit": "cover"
  }
}
```

#### `blur_on_inactive`

```json
{
  "type": "imageFilter",
  "filter": "blur",
  "intensity": "{{active ? 0 : 8}}",
  "child": { "type": "image", "src": "{{cover}}" }
}
```

---

## `indexedStack`  *(layout · Core)*

Displays a single child selected by index. All children retain state.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `index` | `number | binding` | no | 0 | Index of the child to display. |
| `alignment` | `Alignment` | no | "topStart" | Alignment of the displayed child. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | yes | — | Candidate children. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "indexedStack",
  "index": "{{currentStep}}",
  "children": [
    { "type": "text", "text": "Step 1" },
    { "type": "text", "text": "Step 2" },
    { "type": "text", "text": "Step 3" }
  ]
}
```

| `onLongPress` | `Action` | no | — | Long-press handler. |

## `kenBurnsImage`  *(display · Core · v1.3)*

Image with an automatic slow zoom-and-pan animation (the "Ken
Burns effect"). Used for cinematic stills in book chapter
openings, landing pages, and slideshow frames. The image holds
intrinsic resolution and is animated within fit-bounds — no
cropping outside the rendered rectangle.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `src` | `AssetRef` | yes | — | Image source. |
| `duration` | `Dimension` | no | 8000 | Total animation duration in milliseconds. |
| `intensity` | `number` | no | 0.15 | Zoom amount. The image zooms from 1.0 to (1.0 + `intensity`) across `duration`. Practical range: `0.05` (subtle) .. `0.30` (dramatic).  |
| `startAlignment` | `Alignment` | no | "topStart" | Pan start position within the rendered bounds. |
| `endAlignment` | `Alignment` | no | "bottomEnd" | Pan end position within the rendered bounds. |
| `loop` | `boolean` | no | true | When true the animation reverses and replays continuously; when false it stops at the end position. |
| `curve` | `AnimationCurve` | no | "linear" | Easing curve over the zoom/pan progression. |
| `width` | `Dimension` | no | — | Render width. |
| `height` | `Dimension` | no | — | Render height. |
| `fit` | `string` | no | "cover" | How the image scales to its render bounds before the Ken Burns animation overlays. |

### Examples

#### `chapter_opener`

```json
{
  "type": "kenBurnsImage",
  "src": "{{chapter.cover}}",
  "duration": 12000,
  "intensity": 0.2,
  "startAlignment": "topStart",
  "endAlignment": "bottomEnd",
  "loop": true,
  "width": 800,
  "height": 400
}
```

---

## `layoutBuilder`  *(utility · Core)*

Runtime-only responsive container: picks a child by matching the current constraints against a breakpoint map.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `breakpoints` | `object` | no | — | Map of breakpoint name → threshold (e.g., `{ "sm": 480, "md": 768 }`). |
| `layouts` | `object` | no | — | Map of breakpoint name → Widget; matched against `breakpoints`. |
| `default` | `Widget` | no | — | Fallback when no breakpoint matches. Legacy alias: `child`. |

## `lazy`  *(utility · Core)*

Defers construction of a child until it is first rendered.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Deferred child. |

## `lazy`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Defer rendering of an expensive subtree until it enters the viewport (or until explicitly loaded). `lazy` belongs to the Utility group in [`02_Widgets.md`](02_Widgets.md) and is listed here because its schema pairs conceptually with the heavy Advanced widgets above.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `placeholder` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered while `content` is not yet materialized |
| `content` | `Widget | object` | no | — | Inline widget, or `{ source: "ui://..." }` to fetch a remote page fragment. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Multiple deferred widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column. |
| `trigger` | `string` | no | visible | `visible` renders when the widget becomes visible to the user (typically scrolled into view); `immediate` renders on mount; `manual` renders when a `load()` signal is received. |
| `onLoad` | `Action` | no | — | Fired after `content` is materialized |
| `onError` | `Action` | no | — | Fired if `content` fetch fails; `event.error` |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "lazy",
  "placeholder": {
    "type": "box",
    "height": 200,
    "child": { "type": "progressBar" }
  },
  "content": {
    "source": "ui://pages/heavy-component"
  }
}
```

#### `prose_example_1`

```json
{
  "type": "lazy",
  "placeholder": {
    "type": "box",
    "height": 120,
    "child": { "type": "text", "text": "Loading chart…" }
  },
  "content": {
    "type": "chart",
    "chartType": "line",
    "data": "{{salesData}}"
  }
}
```

---

## `lightbox`  *(advanced · Core · v1.3)*

Full-screen modal image viewer with pinch-zoom and swipe-between-
images. Used as a tap target on a thumbnail image — opening the
lightbox transitions the thumbnail into the full-screen view.
Pairs naturally with `hero` for the cover-to-detail morph.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `images` | `array<AssetRef>` | yes | — | Image asset list. Each entry is an AssetRef. |
| `initialIndex` | `number` | no | 0 | Index of the image shown first. |
| `allowZoom` | `boolean` | no | true | Enable pinch-zoom (and double-tap-to-zoom). When false the lightbox shows the image at fit-bounds only. |
| `maxZoom` | `number` | no | 4.0 | Maximum zoom factor (1.0 = fit-bounds). |
| `allowSwipe` | `boolean` | no | true | Enable swipe-between-images. When false the lightbox shows only `images[initialIndex]`. |
| `backgroundColor` | `Color` | no | "#FF000000" | Backdrop color behind the image (typically black or theme.scrim). |
| `onIndexChanged` | `Action` | no | — | Fires when the user swipes to a new image. `event.index` carries the new index. |
| `onClose` | `Action` | no | — | Fires when the user dismisses the lightbox. |

### Examples

#### `gallery`

```json
{
  "type": "lightbox",
  "images": "{{photos}}",
  "initialIndex": "{{tappedIndex}}",
  "allowZoom": true,
  "maxZoom": 6,
  "onClose": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "lightboxOpen", "value": false
  }
}
```

---

## `limitedBox`  *(utility · Core)*

Limits a child's size only when it would otherwise be unbounded.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `maxWidth` | `number` | no | double.infinity | Upper bound when width is unbounded. |
| `maxHeight` | `number` | no | double.infinity | Upper bound when height is unbounded. |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Bounded child. |

---

## `linear`  *(layout · Core)*

**Aliases:** `row`, `column`

Linear (flex) layout along a single axis. Replaces separate `row` / `column` widgets — use `direction: "horizontal"` or `direction: "vertical"`.

Main-axis sizing: when at least one child is `expanded` / `flexible` / `spacer` (or carries a `flex` value), `linear` expands to fill the available main-axis space so those children can distribute the remainder; otherwise it shrink-wraps its children. Authors can override this with the explicit `mainAxisSize` property.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `mainAxisSize` | `string` | no | — | `max` fills the parent along `direction`; `min` shrink-wraps. Defaults to `max` when a flex child (`expanded`/`flexible`/`spacer`) is present, otherwise `min`. |
| `direction` *(aliases: `orientation`, `scrollDirection`)* | `string` | yes | "vertical" | `"horizontal"` or `"vertical"`. |
| `alignment` *(aliases: `crossAxisAlignment`)* | `string` | no | "start" | Cross-axis alignment: `start`, `center`, `end`, `stretch`. |
| `distribution` *(aliases: `mainAxisAlignment`)* | `string` | no | "start" | Main-axis distribution: `start`, `center`, `end`, `spaceBetween`, `spaceAround`, `spaceEvenly`. |
| `spacing` *(aliases: `gap`, `itemSpacing`)* | `number` | no | 0 | Gap between children in logical pixels. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | yes | — | Child widgets arranged along `direction`. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "linear",
  "direction": "vertical",
  "alignment": "center",
  "distribution": "start",
  "spacing": 12,
  "children": [
    { "type": "text", "text": "Title" },
    { "type": "text", "text": "Subtitle" }
  ]
}
```

#### `prose_example_1`

```json
{
  "type": "linear",
  "direction": "horizontal",
  "distribution": "spaceBetween",
  "children": [
    { "type": "text", "text": "Left" },
    { "type": "text", "text": "Right" }
  ]
}
```

---

## `list`  *(list · Core)*

**Aliases:** `listView`, `listview`

Scrollable linear collection rendered from an array binding.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `items` | `binding` | no | — | Array source. Required when `children` is omitted (dynamic list). |
| `itemTemplate` | `Widget` | no | — | Template rendered per bound item. Required with `items`. Iteration variables `item`, `index`, `isFirst`, `isLast`, `isEven`, `isOdd` are in scope. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Static list of widgets. Mutually exclusive with `items` + `itemTemplate`. |
| `spacing` | `number` | no | 0 | Gap between items. |
| `orientation` | `string` | no | "vertical" | `vertical` or `horizontal`. |
| `emptyMessage` | `string` | no | — | Displayed when the list is empty. |
| `itemExtent` | `number` | no | — | Fixed item size for performance. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "list",
  "items": "{{users}}",
  "spacing": 8,
  "itemTemplate": {
    "type": "listItem",
    "title": "{{item.name}}",
    "subtitle": "{{item.email}}"
  }
}
```

---

## `listItem`  *(list · Core)*

**Aliases:** `listTile`, `list-tile`

Single row in a list with optional leading/trailing widgets. Replaces Material `listTile` naming.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `title` | `string | Widget` | no | — | Primary text, or an inline Widget for rich titles. |
| `subtitle` | `string | Widget` | no | — | Secondary text, or an inline Widget. |
| `leading` | `Widget` | no | — | Leading widget (icon, avatar). |
| `trailing` | `Widget` | no | — | Trailing widget. |
| `onTap` | `Action` | no | — | Tap handler. |
| `selected` | `boolean` | no | false | Selected state. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the item is interactive. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "listItem",
  "title": "{{item.name}}",
  "subtitle": "{{item.description}}",
  "leading": { "type": "avatar", "label": "{{item.initials}}" },
  "onTap": {
    "type": "navigation", "action": "push",
    "route": "/detail/{{item.id}}"
  }
}
```

## `map`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Geographic map with markers and overlays.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `center` | ``{ latitude, longitude }`` | no | — | Map center coordinates. Required when flat `latitude` / `longitude` are omitted. |
| `latitude` | `number` | no | — | Flat shorthand for `center.latitude` — legacy alternative to `center`. |
| `longitude` | `number` | no | — | Flat shorthand for `center.longitude` — legacy alternative to `center`. |
| `zoom` | `number` | no | 13 | Zoom level (0–22) |
| `mapType` | `string` | no | standard | Base tile set. |
| `markers` | ``Marker[]`` | no | [] | Point markers |
| `markers[].id` | `string` | yes | — | Unique marker ID |
| `markers[].latitude` | `number` | yes | — | Marker latitude |
| `markers[].longitude` | `number` | yes | — | Marker longitude |
| `markers[].label` | `string` | no | — | Marker label |
| `markers[].icon` | `string` | no | — | Icon name |
| `markers[].color` | `string` | no | — | Marker color |
| `overlays` | ``Overlay[]`` | no | [] | Polygon / polyline / circle overlays |
| `overlays[].type` | `string` | yes | — | Overlay shape. |
| `overlays[].points` | ``{ latitude, longitude }[]`` | no | required for polygon/polyline | Vertex list |
| `overlays[].fillColor` | `string` | no | — | Fill color (polygon/circle) |
| `overlays[].strokeColor` | `string` | no | — | Stroke color |
| `overlays[].strokeWidth` | `number` | no | 1 | Stroke width |
| `onMarkerTap` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on marker tap; `event.id` is the marker ID |
| `onMapTap` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on map tap; `event.latitude` / `event.longitude` |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "map",
  "center": { "latitude": 37.5665, "longitude": 126.9780 },
  "zoom": 13,
  "mapType": "standard",
  "markers": [
    {
      "id": "m1",
      "latitude": 37.5665,
      "longitude": 126.9780,
      "label": "Seoul City Hall",
      "icon": "location_pin",
      "color": "#F44336"
    },
    {
      "id": "m2",
      "latitude": 37.5512,
      "longitude": 126.9882,
      "label": "Namsan Tower"
    }
  ],
  "overlays": [
    {
      "type": "polygon",
      "points": [
        { "latitude": 37.570, "longitude": 126.975 },
        { "latitude": 37.570, "longitude": 126.985 },
        { "latitude": 37.560, "longitude": 126.985 }
      ],
      "fillColor": "rgba(33,150,243,0.3)",
      "strokeColor": "#2196F3",
      "strokeWidth": 2
    }
  ],
  "onMarkerTap": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "selectedMarker", "value": "{{event.id}}"
  }
}
```

## `margin`  *(layout · Core)*

Applies outer margin around a single child.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `margin` *(aliases: `value`)* | `EdgeInsets` | yes | — | Outer margin. |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Child widget. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{ "type": "margin", "margin": { "all": 16 },
  "child": { "type": "text", "text": "With outer margin" } }
```

## `markdown`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Markdown renderer.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `text` | `string ` | no | binding | required | Markdown source |
| `selectable` | `boolean` | no | false | Allow text selection |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Widget width |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Widget height |
| `fontSize` | `number` | no | — | Base font size |
| `textColor` | `string` | no | — | Default text color |
| `linkColor` | `string` | no | — | Hyperlink color |
| `codeBackgroundColor` | `string` | no | — | Code-block background |
| `onLinkTap` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on link tap; `event.url` is the target |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "markdown",
  "text": "# Hello World\n\nThis is **markdown** content with [a link](https://example.com).",
  "selectable": true,
  "width": 600,
  "fontSize": 16,
  "textColor": "#212121",
  "linkColor": "#1976D2",
  "codeBackgroundColor": "#F5F5F5",
  "onLinkTap": {
    "type": "navigation", "action": "push",
    "route": "{{event.url}}"
  }
}
```

## `mediaPlayer`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Audio / video player widget.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `source` *(aliases: `src`)* | `AssetRef` | yes | — | Media asset reference (audio or video file). |
| `mediaType` | `string` | no | inferred | Media kind. |
| `autoPlay` | `boolean` | no | false | Start playing automatically |
| `loop` | `boolean` | no | false | Loop at end |
| `muted` | `boolean` | no | false | Start muted |
| `volume` | `number` | no | 1.0 | Volume 0.0–1.0 |
| `controls` | `boolean` | no | true | Show native controls |
| `poster` | `AssetRef` | no | — | Preview image rendered before playback starts (video only). |
| `waveform` | `boolean` | no | false | Audio mode only. When true, the audio's amplitude waveform is rendered above the transport controls, advancing with playback. Ignored for video sources.  |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Display width |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Display height |
| `onPlay` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when playback starts |
| `onPause` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when playback pauses |
| `onEnded` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when media ends |
| `onTimeUpdate` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on time update; `event.currentTime` in seconds |
| `onError` | `Action` | no | — | Fired on playback error; `event.error` |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "mediaPlayer",
  "source": "bundle://assets/intro.mp4",
  "mediaType": "video",
  "autoPlay": false,
  "loop": false,
  "muted": false,
  "volume": 0.8,
  "controls": true,
  "poster": "bundle://assets/intro_poster.png",
  "width": 640,
  "height": 360,
  "onPlay": { "type": "state", "action": "set", "binding": "isPlaying", "value": true },
  "onPause": { "type": "state", "action": "set", "binding": "isPlaying", "value": false },
  "onEnded": { "type": "state", "action": "set", "binding": "isPlaying", "value": false },
  "onTimeUpdate": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set", "binding": "currentTime", "value": "{{event.currentTime}}"
  }
}
```

## `mediaQuery`  *(utility · Core)*

Responsive widget that inspects the current layout context and picks a child based on media-query conditions. Supports a `then`/`else` expression form and a `breakpoints` map form. The binding engine exposes `{{media.width}}`, `{{media.height}}`, `{{media.orientation}}` inside `condition`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `condition` | `object | binding` | no | — | Boolean expression (string) or constraint object like `{minWidth, maxWidth}`; selects `then` when truthy. |
| `then` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered when `condition` is truthy. |
| `else` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered when `condition` is falsy. Legacy alias: `orElse`. |
| `breakpoints` | `object` | no | — | Map of breakpoint name → Widget (e.g., `{ "sm": ..., "md": ... }`). |
| `defaultChild` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered when no breakpoint matches. |

---

## `navigationRail`  *(navigation · Core)*

Vertical navigation rail for tablet/desktop layouts. Each item's text field is `label`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `selectedIndex` | `number | binding` | no | — | Currently selected item. |
| `items` *(aliases: `destinations`)* | `NavItem[]` | yes | — | `{ icon, label, route? }` entries. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when selection changes. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "navigationRail",
  "selectedIndex": "{{selectedNavIndex}}",
  "items": [
    { "icon": "dashboard", "label": "Dashboard", "route": "/dashboard" },
    { "icon": "people",    "label": "Users",     "route": "/users" },
    { "icon": "settings",  "label": "Settings",  "route": "/settings" }
  ],
  "onChange": {
    "type": "navigation", "action": "push", "route": "{{event.route}}"
  }
}
```

Network topology graph. Same node/edge model as `graph`, with topology-oriented defaults (hierarchical layout, directed edges).

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "networkGraph",
  "nodes": "{{graphNodes}}",
  "edges": "{{graphEdges}}",
  "layout": "hierarchical",
  "directed": true
}
```

## `numberField`  *(input · Core)*

Specialized input for numeric values. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is `number`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `label` | `string` | no | — | Field label. |
| `min` | `number` | no | — | Minimum value. |
| `max` | `number` | no | — | Maximum value. |
| `step` | `number` | no | 1 | Increment size. |
| `decimalPlaces` | `number` | no | 0 | Decimal precision. |
| `prefix` | `string` | no | — | Leading display text (e.g., `"$"`). |
| `suffix` | `string` | no | — | Trailing display text. |
| `thousandSeparator` | `string` | no | — | Thousands separator for display. |

## `offlineFallback`  *(utility · Core)*

Swaps between an online widget and an offline fallback based on connectivity tracked by the runtime. Connectivity state may be pinned by an `isOnline` binding for tests.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `online` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered while connectivity is available. |
| `offline` | `Widget` | no | — | Rendered while offline. |
| `message` | `string` | no | — | Message shown inside the offline state. |
| `icon` | `string` | no | — | Icon rendered in the default offline state. |
| `showRetry` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether to show a retry affordance. |
| `onRetry` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the user taps retry. |
| `isOnline` | `boolean | binding` | no | — | Explicit connectivity override. |

## `opacity`  *(animation · Core · v1.3)*

Wraps a child with opacity, with optional animation.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `opacity` | `number | binding` | yes | — | Opacity in `0.0..1.0`. |
| `animated` | `boolean` | no | false | Animate opacity changes. |
| `duration` | `number` | no | 300 | Animation duration in milliseconds (when `animated: true`). |
| `curve` | `string` | no | "easeInOut" | Animation curve (when `animated: true`). |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Child widget. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "opacity",
  "opacity": "{{item.isActive ? 1.0 : 0.3}}",
  "animated": true,
  "duration": 200,
  "child": {
    "type": "card",
    "child": { "type": "text", "text": "{{item.name}}" }
  }
}
```

Applies padding around a single child.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |

## `pageView`  *(scroll · Core)*

Full-viewport paged scroll view. Snaps one page per swipe; ideal
for book pages, photo galleries, onboarding flows. Distinct from
`carousel` (partial-viewport, peeking neighbours) — pageView is
always one full page. Each child is rendered as a separate page.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `direction` | `string` | no | "horizontal" | Scroll axis. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | yes | — | One child per page. |
| `initialPage` | `number` | no | 0 | Index of the page rendered first. |
| `loop` | `boolean` | no | false | When true the list wraps around — last → first. |
| `scrollPhysics` | `string` | no | "clamping" | Edge / overscroll behaviour. `bouncing` mirrors iOS rubber-band; `clamping` is the Android-style hard stop; `neverScrollable` disables user dragging (use programmatic page change only).  |
| `allowImplicitScrolling` | `boolean` | no | false | Pre-render the adjacent pages off-screen so subsequent swipes are instant (assistive-technology friendly). Costs memory.  |
| `onPageChanged` | `Action` | no | — | Fires after the active page settles. `event.page` carries the new index. |

### Examples

#### `book_pages`

```json
{
  "type": "pageView",
  "direction": "horizontal",
  "scrollPhysics": "bouncing",
  "children": [
    { "type": "richText", "spans": [ { "text": "{{book.chapter1}}" } ] },
    { "type": "richText", "spans": [ { "text": "{{book.chapter2}}" } ] }
  ],
  "onPageChanged": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "currentPage", "value": "{{event.page}}"
  }
}
```

---

## `permissionPrompt`  *(utility · Core)*

Presents a prompt for one or more client capabilities (e.g., clipboard, filesystem). See [`07_Security.md`](07_Security.md) for the permission vocabulary.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `permissions` | `string[]` | no | — | Permission identifiers (e.g., `["client.clipboard"]`). Required when `permissionType` is omitted. |
| `permissionType` | `string` | no | — | Single-permission shorthand for `permissions: [permissionType]`. |
| `style` | `string` | no | "inline" | `inline`, `dialog`, `banner`. |
| `title` | `string` | no | — | Prompt title. |
| `description` | `string` | no | — | Prompt body. |
| `icon` | `string` | no | — | Icon shown alongside the prompt. |
| `allowPartial` | `boolean` | no | false | Allow the user to grant a subset. |
| `onAllow` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the user grants (all / partial per `allowPartial`). |
| `onDeny` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the user denies. |

Button that reveals a popup menu of options.

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |

## `positioned`  *(layout · Core)*

Positions a child within a `stack` using offsets.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Positioned widget. |

## `progressBar`  *(display · Core)*

**Aliases:** `linearProgressIndicator`, `loadingIndicator`, `loading-indicator`, `progress-bar`, `progress`

Progress indicator (linear or circular).

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `value` | `number | binding` | no | — | Progress in `0.0..1.0`; omit for indeterminate. |
| `indicatorType` | `string` | no | "linear" | `linear` or `circular`. |
| `color` | `string` | no | theme primary | Foreground color. |
| `backgroundColor` | `string` | no | — | Track color. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "progressBar",
  "value": 0.65,
  "indicatorType": "linear",
  "color": "#4CAF50",
  "backgroundColor": "#E0E0E0"
}
```

## `radio`  *(input · Core)*

Single radio button. The group's selected value is bound via `groupValue` (or the enclosing `radioGroup`'s `binding`).

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `value` | `any` | yes | — | This button's value. |
| `groupValue` | `any | binding` | yes | — | Currently selected value in the group. |
| `label` | `string` | no | — | Optional label. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when selected. |

---

## `radioGroup`  *(input · Core)*

Single-selection radio group. Shared rows per §2.6.0.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `options` *(aliases: `items`)* | `Option[]` | yes | — | `{ value, label }` entries. |
| `orientation` | `string` | no | "vertical" | `vertical` or `horizontal`. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "radioGroup",
  "binding": "settings.language",
  "options": [
    { "value": "en", "label": "English" },
    { "value": "es", "label": "Español" }
  ]
}
```

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |

| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |

| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `min` | `number` | no | 0 | Minimum value. |
| `max` | `number` | no | 1 | Maximum value. |
| `divisions` | `number` | no | — | Number of discrete steps. |

## `richText`  *(display · Core)*

Multi-span styled text — paragraph composition for long-form content
(articles, book chapters, captions with inline emphasis or icons).
Each `Span` is either a styled text run or an inline widget; the
paragraph-level `style` provides the base TextStyle that individual
span styles layer on top of.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `spans` | `array<Span>` | yes | — | Inline span list. Each entry is a `Span` (TextSpan or WidgetSpan). See the `Span` $def for the two shapes.  |
| `style` | `TextStyle` | no | — | Paragraph base style applied to every span unless overridden. Use this for a uniform `lineHeight` / `letterSpacing` / `fontFamily` / `color` across the paragraph; per-span styles layer on top via `merge` semantics.  |
| `dropCap` | `DropCap` | no | — | Render the first character of the first `TextSpan` as an enlarged drop cap that the paragraph flows around. Mutually exclusive with `maxLines`.  |
| `textAlign` | `string` | no | "start" | Alignment for the composed paragraph. |
| `textDirection` | `string` | no | — | Resolution direction for `start`/`end` alignment. |
| `maxLines` | `number` | no | — | Maximum rendered lines. Mutually exclusive with `dropCap`. |
| `overflow` | `string` | no | "clip" | Overflow behaviour when content exceeds `maxLines`. |
| `softWrap` | `boolean` | no | true | When false, the paragraph never wraps and overflow rules apply at the right edge. |

### Examples

#### `text_run_with_emphasis`

Simple multi-style text run.


```json
{
  "type": "richText",
  "style": { "fontSize": 16, "height": 1.5 },
  "spans": [
    { "text": "Hello " },
    { "text": "{{user.name}}", "style": { "fontWeight": "bold" } },
    { "text": "!" }
  ]
}
```

#### `inline_widget_span`

TextSpan + WidgetSpan mixed (inline icon).


```json
{
  "type": "richText",
  "spans": [
    { "text": "Pressed " },
    { "widget": { "type": "icon", "icon": "favorite", "size": 14 }, "alignment": "middle" },
    { "text": " 12 times" }
  ]
}
```

#### `drop_cap_article`

Article opening with drop cap.


```json
{
  "type": "richText",
  "style": { "fontSize": 17, "height": 1.55 },
  "dropCap": { "lines": 3, "style": { "fontFamily": "serif", "fontWeight": "bold" } },
  "spans": [
    { "text": "Once upon a time, in a land far far away, there lived a runtime that loved its decorations." }
  ]
}
```

---

## `rive`  *(animation · Core · v1.3)*

Plays a Rive animation (`.riv` asset) — the alternative to
`lottieAnimation` when the asset was authored in Rive. State-machine
inputs are driven via `inputs` so the same asset reacts to host
state changes (toggle, scrub, trigger). Distinct from Lottie:
Rive supports interactive state machines, vector deformation, and
smaller binary footprints; Lottie is After Effects-based and
better suited to time-driven motion graphics.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `src` | `AssetRef` | yes | — | Rive asset path (`bundle://...riv`, `https://...riv`, `assets/...riv`). |
| `artboard` | `string` | no | — | Named artboard to render. Defaults to the file's primary artboard. |
| `animation` | `string` | no | — | Named timeline animation. Mutually exclusive with `stateMachine`. |
| `stateMachine` | `string` | no | — | Named state machine. Mutually exclusive with `animation`. |
| `inputs` | `object` | no | — | Map of state-machine input name → value. `boolean` / `number` / `trigger` (set to `true` to fire) — type matches the input's declared type in the Rive file.  |
| `fit` | `string` | no | "contain" | How the artboard scales within its render bounds. |
| `alignment` | `Alignment` | no | "center" | Alignment of the artboard within its render bounds. |
| `width` | `Dimension` | no | — | Render width in logical pixels. |
| `height` | `Dimension` | no | — | Render height in logical pixels. |

### Examples

#### `animated_avatar`

```json
{
  "type": "rive",
  "src": "bundle://avatars/dragon.riv",
  "stateMachine": "Idle",
  "inputs": {
    "happy": "{{user.online}}",
    "wave": "{{justGreeted}}"
  },
  "width": 120,
  "height": 120
}
```

---

## `safeArea`  *(layout · Core)*

Insets children so they avoid system UI overlaps (notch, status bar, home indicator).

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Child widget. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{ "type": "safeArea", "top": true, "bottom": true,
  "child": { "type": "text", "text": "Safe content" } }
```

---

## `scrollAnimated`  *(animation · Core · v1.3)*

Animation driven by scroll position rather than time. Wraps a
child and reads from an ancestor scroll view's offset. Each
`binding` maps a scroll-offset window to a property tween — when
scroll passes through `[fromOffset, toOffset]` the property
interpolates between `fromValue` and `toValue` linearly (or via
`curve`).

Common uses: parallax masthead (image translates 50% scroll
speed), reveal-on-scroll (fade in as element enters viewport),
shrinking title (font scales as user scrolls down).

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `bindings` | `array<object>` | yes | — | Per-property scroll bindings. Each entry is `{property, fromOffset, toOffset, fromValue, toValue, curve?}`: - `property` — `opacity` / `scale` / `translateX` /   `translateY` / `rotate`. Other properties may be wired by   runtime extensions. - `fromOffset` / `toOffset` — scroll-position window in   logical pixels. - `fromValue` / `toValue` — interpolated target values for the   property at the window endpoints. - `curve` — optional easing across the window. Defaults to   `linear`.  |
| `child` | `Widget` | yes | — | Animated subtree. |

### Examples

#### `parallax_masthead`

```json
{
  "type": "scrollAnimated",
  "bindings": [
    {
      "property": "translateY",
      "fromOffset": 0,
      "toOffset": 240,
      "fromValue": 0,
      "toValue": -120
    }
  ],
  "child": { "type": "image", "src": "{{cover}}", "fit": "cover" }
}
```

---

## `scrollBar`  *(scroll · Core)*

Wraps a scrollable child with a visible scroll bar.

The runtime MUST provide a shared scroll controller to both the scroll bar and its scrollable child. When `thumbVisibility` or `trackVisibility` is `true`, the controller is required to drive the visibility; omitting it is a runtime error. Authors SHOULD NOT manage the controller manually — the runtime injects it transparently so the child scrollable (`scrollView`, `singleChildScrollView`, `list`, `grid`, `pageView`) binds to the same position.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `thumbVisibility` | `boolean` | no | — | Whether the scroll thumb is always visible. |
| `trackVisibility` | `boolean` | no | — | Whether the scroll track is always visible. |
| `thickness` | `number` | no | — | Scroll bar thickness. |
| `radius` | `number` | no | — | Scroll bar corner radius. |
| `child` | `Widget` | no | — | Scrollable child. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column. Mutually exclusive with `child`. |

---

## `scrollView`  *(scroll · Core)*

Scrollable viewport. Two layout modes — pick one per instance:

- **Linear mode** — `child` (single widget) or `children` (wrapped
  in an implicit linear column along `direction`). Simplest for
  everyday scrolling content.
- **Sliver mode** — `slivers` array of `Sliver` primitives. Use
  for collapsing app bars, sticky section headers, parallax
  mastheads, or mixing list/grid sections in one viewport.

The three input slots (`child`, `children`, `slivers`) are
mutually exclusive.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `direction` | `string` | no | "vertical" | Scroll axis. |
| `padding` | `EdgeInsets` | no | — | Inner padding around the scrollable content. |
| `scrollPhysics` | `string` | no | "clamping" | Edge / overscroll behaviour. |
| `child` | `Widget` | no | — | Single scrolled child. Mutually exclusive with `children` and `slivers`. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Multiple widgets wrapped in an implicit linear column along `direction`. Mutually exclusive with `child` and `slivers`. |
| `slivers` | `array<Sliver>` | no | — | Sliver entries (sliverAppBar / sliverPersistentHeader / sliverList / sliverGrid / sliverFixedExtentList). Mutually exclusive with `child` and `children`.  |

### Examples

#### `linear_mode`

```json
{
  "type": "scrollView",
  "direction": "vertical",
  "padding": { "all": 16 },
  "children": [
    { "type": "text", "text": "Hello" },
    { "type": "text", "text": "World" }
  ]
}
```

#### `sliver_mode_collapsing_app_bar`

```json
{
  "type": "scrollView",
  "slivers": [
    {
      "type": "sliverAppBar",
      "expandedHeight": 240,
      "pinned": true,
      "stretch": true,
      "title": { "type": "text", "text": "Library" },
      "background": { "type": "image", "src": "{{cover}}", "fit": "cover" }
    },
    {
      "type": "sliverList",
      "items": "{{books}}",
      "itemTemplate": { "type": "listItem", "title": "{{item.title}}" }
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## `segmentedControl`  *(input · Core)*

Segmented selection, styled as tabs or buttons. Shared rows per §2.6.0.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `options` *(aliases: `segments`)* | `Option[]` | yes | — | `{ value, label, icon? }` entries. |
| `variant` | `string` | no | "segmented" | `segmented`, `tabs`, `buttons`. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "segmentedControl",
  "binding": "viewMode",
  "options": [
    { "value": "list", "label": "List", "icon": "list" },
    { "value": "grid", "label": "Grid", "icon": "grid_view" }
  ]
}
```

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |

Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` | `string | number | boolean | object | array` | no | — | One-way initial/display value (§2.6.0). Literal or `{{path}}`; used when `binding` is not set. |

## `signature`  *(advanced · Core · v1.0)*

Signature capture pad.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `binding` | `binding` | no | — | Target binding for signature data (base64 PNG or SVG path). Required when capturing is needed; may be omitted for pure display. |
| `penColor` *(aliases: `color`)* | `string` | no | #000000 | Stroke color |
| `penWidth` *(aliases: `strokeWidth`)* | `number` | no | 2.0 | Stroke width |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Widget width |
| `height` | `number` | no | — | Widget height |
| `backgroundColor` | `string` | no | — | Pad background |
| `borderColor` | `string` | no | — | Pad border |
| `showClearButton` | `boolean` | no | true | Show a clear-signature button |
| `showGuide` | `boolean` | no | false | Show a signing guide line |
| `onSignatureEnd` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when a stroke completes |
| `onClear` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the signature is cleared |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "signature",
  "binding": "{{signatureData}}",
  "penColor": "#000000",
  "penWidth": 2.0,
  "width": 400,
  "height": 200,
  "backgroundColor": "#FFFFFF",
  "borderColor": "#E0E0E0",
  "showClearButton": true,
  "showGuide": true,
  "onSignatureEnd": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "signatureData", "value": "{{event.value}}"
  },
  "onClear": {
    "type": "state", "action": "set",
    "binding": "signatureData", "value": null
  }
}
```

---

## `simpleDialog`  *(dialog · Core)*

Dialog presenting a list of options.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `title` | `string` | no | — | Dialog title. |
| `options` | `Option[]` | no | — | `{ value, label, icon? }` entries. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Custom option widgets. Mutually exclusive with `options`. |
| `onSelect` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when an option is chosen. |
| `onClose` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the dialog is dismissed without an option being selected. |

## `singleChildScrollView`  *(scroll · Core)*

Lightweight scrollable wrapper for a single child.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `direction` | `string` | no | "vertical" | Scroll direction. |
| `padding` | `EdgeInsets` | no | — | Inner padding. |
| `child` | `Widget` | no | — | Scrolled content. Required when `children` is omitted. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | no | — | Multiple widgets; runtime wraps them in a linear column along `direction`. Mutually exclusive with `child`. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "singleChildScrollView",
  "direction": "vertical",
  "padding": { "all": 16 },
  "child": {
    "type": "linear", "direction": "vertical",
    "children": [
      { "type": "text", "text": "First section" },
      { "type": "text", "text": "Second section" }
    ]
  }
}
```

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `width` | `number` | no | — | Width in logical pixels. |

| `child` | `Widget` | no | — | Optional child. |

## `slider`  *(input · Core)*

Continuous single-value selection. Shared rows per §2.6.0; `value` is `number`.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `binding` | `string` | no | — | State path bound two-way to the widget value (§2.6.0). Runtime reads/writes this path without requiring an explicit onChange. |
| `value` *(aliases: `values`)* | `number` | no | — | Current numeric value (overrides shared contract to register `values` legacy alias). |
| `enabled` | `boolean` | no | true | Whether the widget accepts user input (§2.6.0). Default `true`. |
| `onChange` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the widget value changes (§2.6.0). Event payload exposes `event.value`. |
| `min` | `number` | no | 0 | Minimum value. |
| `max` | `number` | no | 1 | Maximum value. |
| `divisions` | `number` | no | — | Number of discrete steps. |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "slider",
  "binding": "settings.volume",
  "min": 0, "max": 100, "divisions": 10
}
```

## `snackBar`  *(dialog · Core)*

Transient notification at the bottom of the screen.

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `content` | `string` | yes | — | Message text. |
| `duration` | `number` | no | 4000 | Display duration in milliseconds. |
| `action` | `SnackBarAction` | no | — | `{ label, onTap }` optional action. |
| `onClose` | `Action` | no | — | Fired when the snackbar is dismissed (timeout, swipe-away, or `action.onTap` complete). |

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "snackBar",
  "content": "Item deleted successfully",
  "duration": 4000,
  "action": {
    "label": "Undo",
    "onTap": { "type": "tool", "tool": "undoDelete",
               "params": { "id": "{{deletedItemId}}" } }
  }
}
```

Flexible empty space inside a `linear` parent.

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |

## `stack`  *(layout · Core)*

Overlapping children. Non-positioned children align per `alignment`; positioned children use explicit offsets (see `positioned`).

### Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `click` | `Action` | no | — | Action fired when the widget is tapped. Runtime wraps the widget in a gesture surface and dispatches the action on tap. Widget-local activation surfaces (`button.onTap`, `iconButton.onTap`, `richText.spans[].onTap`, …) remain canonical for those widgets and are NOT replaced by `click`; `click` is the universal fallback for widgets that have no dedicated activation slot.  |
| `tooltip` | `string` | no | — | Hover / long-press tooltip text. Runtime wraps the widget in a `Tooltip` surface.  |
| `alignment` | `Alignment` | no | "topStart" | Alignment of non-positioned children. |
| `fit` | `string` | no | "loose" | Sizing of non-positioned children: `loose`, `expand`, `passthrough`. |
| `children` | `Widget[]` | yes | — | Stacked children (rendered in order; later children render on top). |

### Examples

#### `prose_example_0`

```json
{
  "type": "stack",
  "alignment": "topStart",
  "children": [
    { "type": "image", "src": "bundle://hero.png" },
    { "type": "positioned", "top": 8, "right": 8,
      "child": { "type": "badge", "label": "NEW" } }
  ]
}
```
